infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AI Pose Suggestor needs camera access to suggest poses based on your body and surroundings. Your camera frames never leave your device.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AI Pose Suggestor uses your location to suggest poses curated for landmarks near you. Your location is never uploaded.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: AI Pose Suggestor uses your location to suggest poses curated for landmarks near you. Your location is never uploaded.
